MINI MINUTES: Line 6
Judge Pro Tem: Sigrid Irias, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Allen Wong is present.
Attorney David Foran for the plaintiff.
Defendants Venustiano Velasquez/Hector Figueroa is present.
Attorney Elle D. Lewis appearing for both defendants in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of Dec. 08, 2014 is vacated. (501/jpt)
